_doc: Daemon protocol drift gate fixtures. Each entry pins one UDS op's wire contract: the request shape the daemon accepts and the response shape it emits. Consumed by two gates: (1) Rust integration test asserts handler output contains every `response_required_keys` entry; (2) Go test in clients/go/leyline-schema/daemon/ asserts the response JSON decodes into the matching typed binding without UnmarshalTypeError. Together they pin handler→schema agreement. Extends T8.10's cross-runtime fixture pattern (bead 6b7d43) from segment-file substrate to the JSON wire. `go_drift_skip` is non-null only for ops where daemon.capnp and the handler currently disagree — bead b631c8 (A-2) reconciles those additively. See docs/TABLE_CONTRACT.md.

status.go_drift_skip: b631c8: StatusResponse schema declares {ok, generation, arenaPath, arenaSize} but handler emits {ok, phase, current_root, arena_path, arena_size, enrichment, head_sha?, last_reparse_at_ms?, error?}. A-2 adds missing fields additively.

flush.go_drift_skip: b631c8: no FlushResponse declared in daemon.capnp. A-2 adds it (returns {ok, currentRoot}).

snapshot.go_drift_skip: b631c8: SnapshotResponse declares {ok, generation} but handler emits {ok, current_root}. A-2 reconciles.

list_roots.go_drift_skip: b631c8: ListChildrenResponse declares children:List(Node) with full Node fields (id, parentId, name, kind, size, record); handler emits per-child {id, name, kind, size} only. A-2 either expands handler to emit full Node OR introduces a NodeStat lite type.

list_children.go_drift_skip: b631c8: same drift as list_roots — child entries are stat-shaped, not full Node.

get_node.go_drift_skip: b631c8: GetNodeResponse.node declares camelCase Node (id, parentId, name, kind, size, record); handler emits snake_case (parent_id). A-2 picks: add JSON tags on Go side OR rename schema fields.

find_callers.go_drift_skip: b631c8: FindCallersResponse.callers declares List(Ref) with camelCase (nodeId, sourceId); handler emits snake_case (node_id, source_id). A-2 adds JSON tags or renames schema fields.

find_defs.go_drift_skip: b631c8: same snake_case vs camelCase drift as find_callers.

find_callees.go_drift_skip: b631c8: same snake_case vs camelCase drift as find_callers (node_id/source_id vs nodeId/sourceId). A-2 reconciles.

get_refs_map.go_drift_skip: b631c8: schema declares TokenMapEntry.nodeIds (camelCase) but handler emits node_ids (snake_case). A-2 reconciles alongside find_callers/find_defs.

get_defs_map.go_drift_skip: b631c8: same node_ids snake_case drift as get_refs_map.

get_db_path.go_drift_skip: b631c8: handler emits snake_case (db_path, ctrl_path, etc) vs schema camelCase (dbPath, ctrlPath). A-2 reconciles alongside other snake/camel drifts.

query.go_drift_skip: b631c8: QueryResponse declares rows:List(QueryRow) where QueryRow has values:List(Text) (positional). Handler emits rows as column-keyed objects. Structural mismatch; A-2 decides whether to ratify column-keyed shape (more JSON-idiomatic) or refactor handler.
